title: Database pack restructuring (03b): per-provider files + matcher DSL migration + gaps
description:
Restructure database packs to match plan 03b-packs-database.md.

1. **Restructure**: Move from flat internal/packs/database.go to internal/packs/database/ directory with per-provider files (postgres.go, mysql.go, redis.go, mongodb.go, sqlite.go, generic.go).

2. **Matcher DSL migration**: Convert all raw string matching to use builder DSL over ExtractedCommand (SQLContent, ArgAtFold, CheckFlagValues matcher models from plan).

3. **Fix mongos gap**: Pack keywords include mongos but destructive matchers only check mongosh/mongo. Implement full mongos support.

4. **Golden files + tests**: Per-provider golden file entries and unit tests.

Follows the pattern established by core pack expansion (task 3).

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete in local commit b5c8558: moved database packs into internal/packs/database/* with init() registration, wired blank imports in guard/eval, added mongos destructive coverage in golden corpus and property test. Awaiting reviewer validation; push currently blocked in runtime (uid 501 auth).

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewed by dcg-reviewer, no issues found. Completed in commit b5c8558.
